original:
"Not at all," he says, quite seriously.

"I bring the dynamism and culture of Kazeron to this staid backwater, and it will be much improved by my example and leadership."
translated:
"Pas du tout," dit-il, très sérieusement.

"J'apporte le dynamisme et la culture de Kazeron à ce trou perdu guindé, et il sera grandement amélioré par mon exemple et mon leadership."

original:
He smiles, turning his head slightly into a practiced angle to better emphasize his jawline.

"That would be Gens Hannan you recognize, $playerSirOrMadam"
translated:
Il sourit, tournant légèrement la tête selon un angle étudié pour mieux mettre en valeur sa mâchoire.

"C'est Gens Hannan que vous reconnaissez, $playerSirOrMadam."

option_line: postGAFC_newArchonAsk3b:"This post must be a terrible burden. Thank you for your service." (sarcastic)
original: This post must be a terrible burden. Thank you for your service." (sarcastic)
translated: Ce poste doit être un terrible fardeau. Merci pour votre service." (sarcastique)

option_line: postGAFC_newArchonDemarchonCorrection:"Demarchon. Not captain. I lead a member-polity in the League."
original: Demarchon. Not captain. I lead a member-polity in the League.
translated: Démarque. Pas capitaine. Je dirige un État membre de la Ligue.

original:
"Is that so?" $HeOrShe raises an eyebrow.

"How charming. I'm sure your contribution to our League will be acknowledged sooner or later."
translated:
"Vraiment ?" $HeOrShe lève un sourcil.

"Comme c'est charmant. Je suis sûr que votre contribution à notre Ligue sera reconnue tôt ou tard."
